title: Exploring Artificial Intelligence Opportunities For Young PR Professionals
description: Exploring artificial intelligence opportunities for young PR rofessionals at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Int
html: Exploring artificial intelligence opportunities for young PR rofessionals at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
